final:
// // This module implements a 32-bit wide, 2-to-1 demultiplexer. When Op is 0, Out reflects In2; when Op is 1, Out equals In1.
module top_module(
	 input [31:0] In1,
	 input [31:0] In2,
	 input Op,
	 output [31:0] Out
	 );assign Out=(Op==0)? In1 :In2;endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 32-bit wide, 2-to-1 demultiplexer. When Op is 0, Out reflects In2; when Op is 1, Out equals In1.
